segments.beat: overhead flat-lay of clear-shell device with PCB fully visible and see-through display lit cyan
camera pulls back, device displayed at slight angle showing transparent top shell and active display
close overhead on display showing blue game-text on transparent screen, PCB visible beneath
slow pan across device top showing display and internals through clear resin
camera drifts to side — display still lit, chip/IC visible through shell near right edge
camera pans down body revealing D-pad buttons, IC chip clearly visible through transparent shell
continued pan down — A/B button cluster and USB-C port bottom edge come into frame through clear shell
final frame: full device in portrait, USB-C bottom, all controls visible, transparent shell throughout
last sampled frame — bottom edge with USB-C, side of clear shell, resting on wood-grain surface

demonstrates.motion_value: camera orbits around the device top-to-bottom, continuously revealing PCB, IC chips, and traces through the clear resin shell
cyan game text glows on the transparent pane while background PCB remains visible through the display
stylized pixel text on display suggests game UI; no active gameplay motion visible
IC chips and PCB traces visually prominent as camera sweeps past — implies electronics access
overhead reveal with wood-surface context establishes small form factor but no hand or reference object in frame
slow pan along clear resin edges shows clean molding and component fit; premium finish implied

selection_note: Slow deliberate pan from top face down the body keeps transparency_internals_visible and see_through_display_on both in frame simultaneously — strongest available proof of the two load-bearing claims.

aesthetics.standout: screen glow visible in dim conditions
aesthetics.weakness: flat overhead desk lighting, cluttered chassis, heavy black letterboxing
aesthetics.note: prototype bench footage - no art direction; full reshoot before paid placement
